name: LG 15 Place Setting Dishwasher – DFB435FV (Prime Silver)
description: LG 15 place setting free-standing dishwasher with QuadWash™, TrueSteam™, Auto Open Door drying, Wi-Fi ThinQ, and EasyRack™ Plus for versatile loading in Prime Silver.
features: QuadWash™ – four multi-motion spray arms for maximum coverage
TrueSteam™ – high-temperature steam removes masala stains & 99.999% bacteria
Auto Open Door – opens automatically at end of cycle for faster drying
EasyRack™ Plus – height-adjustable upper rack fits tall Indian vessels
LG ThinQ Wi-Fi – remote monitoring and cycle download via smartphone
Inverter Direct Drive Motor – quiet, energy-efficient, 10-year warranty
SenseClean – turbidity sensor auto-adjusts water & time
Dual Zone Wash – separate intensity for upper and lower racks
Half Load option
Machine Clean Reminder
